text.message: pls if you cant play let a bot take your place
if somebody goes 8 4 i solo block and se lf block all game so we both lose
And he knows that it’s a good spot
yeah and i lose so blue loses too with me
Red do you wanna strike a better deal
You can’t do that. It’s a good spot for blue
If I don’t take that spot I’ll solo red
i will lose so i dont mind
okay I’ll prob just take the spot and leave then
Waste of a game, might as well
yeah me too i go eat
Red will perma rob me oj keep that in mind
I don’t think he would really do that
well you make it more enjoyable to do so
He’s already gonna rob me haha
He’s already king making against me oj
I don’t think he will I think he’s trying to win
you took 8 4 and wanted to also plow me at the 4 11
You are going to rob me till the end of the game
I can’t let you get more spots because then you’ll be more able to rob me
well thats a threat but now i sure will
For another NB I won’t deal?
These are fake nbs oj he’s robbing me
I wasn’t even thinking about that…
red I am genuinely not letting you win this game lol
maybe you too if you pull a mono
And oj, you purposefully fed into reds tactics for your own benefit
So you’ve been playing like a snake too
Sorry my connection is bad. I just got back in
Well played on the plow blue
I wouldn’t have done that if you didn’t team with red
I’m shocked you did it bc that lets red keep road
I’m shocked you’re trying to table talk
I get where you are coming from. In that case we are even now
i will never city so i will just relax here
Also long term you still take road
Nobody is giving you the win oj
Oj if you take that trade now
I will make sure you’re banned
Oj you’re just as bad as red
We can’t give black the dev pull for the wim
